raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "rhetorical deflection of a risk-based objection via universalization and challenge to the objector",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the activity or thing carries no meaningful danger",
    "every usable thing carries comparable danger",
    "acknowledgment of differential risk is unnecessary or irrelevant",
    "the objection itself is invalid on logical grounds"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as rhetoric but logically weak due to false equivalence and failure to address magnitude or context of risk",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the referenced activity must carry only negligible, everyday-level risk that is genuinely comparable to routine actions, and the statement must serve to reduce disproportionate anxiety rather than dismiss legitimate safety concerns",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the activity must involve elevated or non-comparable risk that is being minimized, or the statement must be used to override evidence-based caution"
}
